about.heading: Hello world!
about.description: Welcome to my website! I'm a Software Engineer in training, with strong Full Stack expertise. Proven experience building scalable SaaS platforms and automating processes that drive operational efficiency.

connect.heading: Connect
connect.description: Reach me by email at [henriquesantos.game@gmail.com](mailto:henriquesantos.game@gmail.com) or connect with me on the social media below.

stack.heading: Development Stack.
stack.description: All the Technologies/Frameworks, Applications, Tools and Services I use to build my projects.

techs.name: Next.js
techs.description: I use Next.js as the frontend framework across all my projects. Its server-side features make it excellent for SEO.

techs.name: Tailwind CSS
techs.description: I use Tailwind CSS to speed up interface development and standardize styling across projects.

techs.name: TypeScript
techs.description: I use TypeScript in full stack development to write safer, typed, and more scalable code.

techs.name: React.js
techs.description: I use React.js to build modern, component-based interfaces, mainly for dashboards and web applications.

techs.name: Node.js
techs.description: I use Node.js on the backend, focused on full stack development and building scalable solutions.

techs.name: Express
techs.description: I know and use Express to structure APIs and backend services with Node.js.

techs.name: Fastify
techs.description: I have experience with Fastify for building high-performance backend APIs.

techs.name: Python
techs.description: I use Python mainly for automating repetitive tasks, web scraping, and processing operational routines.

techs.name: FastAPI
techs.description: I know FastAPI for building Python APIs in a fast and organized way.

techs.name: MySQL
techs.description: I have knowledge in MySQL for data modeling, querying, and backend application integration.

techs.name: PostgreSQL
techs.description: I use PostgreSQL as the database in full stack projects and SaaS applications.

techs.name: Supabase
techs.description: I know Supabase as a database and backend solution for web applications.

techs.name: PocketBase
techs.description: I have experience with PocketBase for supporting applications with a lightweight backend and data management.

techs.name: AWS EC2
techs.description: I use AWS EC2 as a cloud service to host applications and support project infrastructure.

techs.name: Oracle Cloud Services
techs.description: I have basic knowledge of Oracle Cloud Services to support cloud infrastructure solutions.

techs.name: Docker
techs.description: I know Docker for standardizing environments and streamlining application execution and deployment.

techs.name: Kubernetes
techs.description: I have knowledge of Kubernetes as a container orchestration tool in scalable environments.

techs.name: Jira
techs.description: I use Jira as my main project and task management tool, organizing sprints, backlogs, and team workflows. I leverage time tracking to log hours per activity and monitor delivery progress, while also integrating CI/CD pipelines directly into issues to track the full development lifecycle.

techs.name: Git
techs.description: I use Git for code versioning and organizing the development workflow across projects.

techs.name: GitHub
techs.description: I use GitHub for versioning, repository storage, and collaboration throughout development.

techs.name: Bitbucket
techs.description: I know Bitbucket as a code versioning and collaboration platform.
